name: repofabric-linux-admin
description: Browser admin UI for the UNRAID-local fork of RepoFabric. Entra OAuth, first-run setup wizard, users-or-groups access, full WinGet manifest schema custom-publish. RingoSystems Heavy Industries winget repo deployments.

scripts.test: node --test src/peerdist.test.js src/metrics.test.js src/clientconfig.test.js src/intunepolicyscript.test.js src/entra-helper.test.js src/clientbootstrap.test.js
